query:
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  viewCount,
  submittedAt,
  status
FROM echoLibraryCases
WHERE status = 'approved'
ORDER BY submittedAt ASC
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mhhtxpXA9Esras.root --database etVPnUidWNWG8W4GHnRqzv --execute 
SELECT 
  id,
  title,
  viewCount,
  submittedAt,
  status
FROM echoLibraryCases
WHERE status = 'approved'
ORDER BY submittedAt ASC
LIMIT 50;
